overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street. The camera moves steadily along an elevated walkway past towering holographic advertisements, reflective wet pavement, and palm trees, with light traffic visible on the multi-lane road below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway alongside neon-lit avenue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk, observing the neon-lit street and holographic advertisements ahead

entered.detail: massive building-sized holographic display showing a portrait with pink and cyan neon lighting
raised pedestrian sidewalk with glass railing overlooking the street below
dark building exterior with green-tinted illuminated windows and structural details
tall palm trees lining the edge of the walkway between the sidewalk and the street
wet asphalt road with multiple lanes visible below the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk city street at night, viewed from an elevated pedestrian walkway. Massive holographic billboards glow with cyan and pink neon light on the right, while the left side features a dark building facade with green-tinted windows. Palm trees line the edge of the walkway, and the wet pavement reflects the vibrant city lights. The camera moves steadily forward along the walkway with no other pedestrians visible.

events.description: BAR sign becomes visible on the left building as the camera approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway, approaching the street intersection with visible yellow crosswalk markings below

entered.detail: illuminated vertical sign with 'BAR' text on the left building facade
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings visible on the street below
elevated walkway or bridge structure connecting buildings across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues forward, a illuminated BAR sign reveals itself on the left building, marking the approach to a major intersection. The holographic billboard now dominates the right side of the frame at closer range, while yellow crosswalk striping becomes visible on the street below. The palm trees pass by on the right as the walkway opens up to reveal an overhead bridge structure connecting the buildings ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along an elevated pedestrian walkway that transitions from a neon-lit corridor into a wide urban intersection. It begins by gliding past massive cyan and pink holographic billboards on the right and a dark building with green-tinted windows on the left, while the wet pavement reflects the vibrant city glow. As the camera advances, an illuminated bar sign emerges from the shadows of the left facade, signaling the approach to a busier hub. The scene then opens up as the holographic displays loom closer and yellow crosswalk striping appears on the street below, before the walkway finally leads toward a large overhead bridge structure connecting the towering buildings ahead.
